title: cassette player plus
description: A lightweight mod that lets you convert any music disc into a portable cassette and play it anywhere using a handheld cassette player.
body:
![A retro-themed banner for the Minecraft mod “Cassette Player Plus” showing cassette tapes, a portable cassette player, and a storage case, with neon text and a pixel-style background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e852131cecbc993c82c04b7de9dd7732f1922d9.png)

🎶 **Cassette Player Plus** 📼

Turn any music disc into a portable cassette and take your soundtrack wherever you go.

Cassette Player Plus lets you convert any music disc — vanilla or modded — into cassettes and play them through a handheld cassette player. Just right-click the player, insert a cassette, and enjoy your music anywhere in the world.

Now featuring the Boombox, a powerful new block that brings your music into the environment — and even gets mobs moving.

✨ **Features**

Convert any music disc into a cassette

Fully compatible with modded discs

Portable cassette player for music on the go

Simple right-click interface

Survival-friendly crafting

📻 **New: Boombox Block**

Placeable music-playing block that broadcasts cassette audio

Sneak + Right-Click a playing Boombox to pick it up

Music follows you as you walk

Other players hear it fade with distance

🎛 Interactive Controls

Right-Click: Insert or eject a cassette

Left-Click: Skip to the next track on a mix tape

🌟 **Immersive Effects**

Tape insert sound plays before music starts

Music note particles appear around the Boombox — or around you when carrying it

🕺 **The Party Block**

At night, nearby Zombies and Skeletons stop attacking and start dancing to your music.

Admin toggle:
/cassette_player_plus config enableBoomboxDancing [true/false]


![Boombox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b587b1454a85a4a91ac29428a473dd0aff4a21.png)![Cassette Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e971022f724fdb362454a8e3f2e28516585730c.png)![Cassette Case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1813f7bf0a4f34d47b680834d9eeafa37fa6ee90.png)![Blank Cassette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d39b50a4358b7070a741b8bba846f4dfa671f000.png)![Cassette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f52845df3430ccae51652d1d2bb212daeacab26.png)![Mix Tape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee0a2aa83457d7801b47de9f43a1968edca3505f.png)
